name: Caramel-Fudge Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 1 cup of sugar into a frying pan and heat until it forms a smooth liquid, stirring constantly.
2. Add 1 cup of evaporated milk to the sugar mixture. Stir continuously until the lump dissolves completely.
3. Once dissolved, add another 1 cup of evaporated milk and 1 cup of sugar to the pan. Continue stirring.
4. Keep stirring until the mixture starts to thicken and leaves a glossy shine on the surface of the pan.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the walnut meats.
6. Pour the mixture onto a buttered platter to cool completely before serving.
